findings.description: Section s1 content is only ~20 characters, below the 50-character threshold. The source 前提事項 section consists of a single bullet point, so the brevity is faithful, but the section is still flagged by the < 50 char rule.
findings.source_evidence: Source 前提事項: '* javaコマンドがパスに含まれていること'

findings.description: Section s2 hints omit three file names that appear in the first column of the tool-composition table: log.properties, nablarch-X.X.jar (Nablarch Application Framework JAR), and nablarch-tfw-X.X.jar (Nablarch Testing Framework JAR). V4 requires all table first-column values to be represented in hints.
findings.source_evidence: Source 提供方法 table first column: jspGen.bat, jspGen.config, log.properties, nablarch-X.X.jar, nablarch-tfw-X.X.jar, nablarch-toolbox-X.X.jar
